name: 身份未完全揭露型
description: 女主的九天玄女身份始終未向男主完全揭露，讀心術的秘密也未被正面攤開，為後續劇情保留了巨大的懸念空間。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Whoever invented this soul transfer talisman is a genius... Heaven and earth profound in yellow. The five elements gather their energy into my body by decree. Souls shift and swap.
